privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Flanker experiment dataset (flanker_rt_data.csv) containing 4,289 trials from 27 participants. Independent analysis of the dataset confirms that the mean reaction time for congruent trials is exactly 0.47056774933542517 seconds, and for incongruent trials is exactly 0.5159961977847501 seconds. The agent is expected to compute these exact values in the spreadsheet.
